headline: Assessing Microchip Technology (MCHP) Valuation As Earnings Approach And New Intel Timing Modules Launch
summary: Microchip Technology (MCHP) is back in focus as investors watch for its upcoming fiscal fourth quarter earnings and react to new high precision timing modules developed with Intel for data center and 5G vRAN workloads. See our latest analysis for Microchip Technology. That backdrop of product launches and partnerships has coincided with a sharp pick up in momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 37.26% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 96.45% pointing to strong recent gains from a...
